issues.error: Connection refused when connecting to Supabase database
issues.resolution: Implemented retry logic with exponential backoff for Supabase connection failures
issues.approach: The connection to Supabase was failing intermittently due to network timeouts. Added a retry mechanism with exponential backoff (max 3 attempts) to handle transient connection issues.
attempts: Intento 1: Verificar credenciales de Supabase - falló
Intento 2: Revisar URL de conexión - falló

issues.error: Supabase connection refused error on high load
issues.resolution: Added connection pooling and retry strategy for refused connections
issues.approach: Under high load, Supabase refused new connections. Implemented connection pooling (max 10 connections) and retry logic with 1s, 2s, 4s backoff intervals.
attempts: Intento 1: Aumentar timeout - falló
Intento 2: Reducir conexiones concurrentes - parcialmente exitoso

issues.error: Supabase RPC call refused connection after 30 seconds
issues.resolution: Implemented retry mechanism with circuit breaker for Supabase RPC calls
issues.approach: RPC calls to Supabase were timing out and showing connection refused. Added retry logic (3 attempts) and circuit breaker to prevent cascade failures.
attempts: Intento 1: Aumentar timeout a 60s - falló
Intento 2: Dividir RPC en operaciones más pequeñas - falló

issues.error: Connection to Supabase refused during deployment
issues.resolution: Added health check with retry before initializing Supabase connection
issues.approach: On deployment, the app tried to connect to Supabase before it was ready. Implemented a health check endpoint ping with retry (max 5 attempts, 2s interval) before initializing the connection.
attempts: Intento 1: Esperar 10s fijos antes de conectar - falló en deploys lentos

issues.error: Supabase connection refused intermittently in production
issues.resolution: Configured retry policy with jitter to avoid thundering herd on connection failures
issues.approach: Multiple instances were retrying connection at the same time when Supabase refused connections. Added jitter (random 0-500ms delay) to retry logic to spread out reconnection attempts.
attempts: Intento 1: Aumentar pool de conexiones - no resolvió el problema
Intento 2: Retry sin jitter - causó thundering herd

issues.error: JWT token expired during long-running operation
issues.resolution: Implemented automatic token refresh when JWT is about to expire
issues.approach: Long operations were failing because JWT tokens expired mid-execution. Added token expiration check (5min buffer) and automatic refresh mechanism before expiry.
attempts: Intento 1: Aumentar TTL del token a 24h - rechazado por seguridad

issues.error: Expired JWT token not handled gracefully in API endpoints
issues.resolution: Added middleware to catch expired tokens and trigger refresh flow
issues.approach: API calls were returning 401 when JWT expired instead of attempting refresh. Created middleware that detects expired tokens, attempts refresh using refresh token, and retries the original request.
attempts: Intento 1: Manejar en cada endpoint - código duplicado
Intento 2: Middleware que solo rechaza - no intentaba refresh

issues.error: JWT refresh token expired, user logged out unexpectedly
issues.resolution: Implemented sliding window refresh token with rotation
issues.approach: Refresh tokens were expiring after 7 days, forcing logout. Implemented sliding window: each successful refresh issues a new refresh token, extending the session as long as user is active.
attempts: Intento 1: Aumentar TTL de refresh token a 90 días - riesgo de seguridad

issues.error: JWT token signature verification fails after secret rotation
issues.resolution: Support multiple JWT secrets with graceful rotation and token refresh
issues.approach: After rotating JWT secret, all existing tokens became invalid. Implemented multi-secret verification (current + previous secret for 24h grace period) and automatic refresh with new secret.
attempts: Intento 1: Invalidar todos los tokens - mala UX
Intento 2: No rotar secret - riesgo de seguridad

issues.error: Expired JWT causes infinite redirect loop in frontend
issues.resolution: Added token expiration check before requests and preemptive refresh
issues.approach: Frontend was sending requests with expired JWT, getting 401, redirecting to login, which checked auth and redirected back. Added interceptor that checks token expiration (using exp claim) and refreshes before making the request.
attempts: Intento 1: Solo manejar 401 en respuesta - causaba loop
Intento 2: Refresh en cada request - demasiadas llamadas

issues.error: Negative Aurio balance after concurrent redemption requests
issues.resolution: Added database constraint and transaction isolation to prevent negative balances
issues.approach: Two concurrent redemption requests were both checking balance, then both decrementing, resulting in negative Aurio balance. Added CHECK constraint (balance >= 0) in database and SERIALIZABLE isolation level for redemption transactions.
attempts: Intento 1: Validación en Python - race condition persiste
Intento 2: Row-level lock - deadlocks ocasionales

issues.error: Aurio balance becomes negative when mission reward fails to credit
issues.resolution: Implemented two-phase commit for mission completion and Aurio crediting
issues.approach: Mission was marked complete but Aurio credit failed, then retry would decrement without the original credit, causing negative balance. Implemented transaction with savepoint: only mark mission complete if Aurio credit succeeds, rollback otherwise.
attempts: Intento 1: Retry lógica de credito - causaba doble credito
Intento 2: Idempotency key - no prevenía balance negativo

issues.error: Database constraint violation: Aurio balance cannot be negative
issues.resolution: Added validation layer before database operations to prevent constraint violations
issues.approach: Database was throwing constraint violation errors for negative balance, but error handling was poor. Added pre-flight validation: check current balance + delta >= 0 before attempting UPDATE, return meaningful error if check fails.
attempts: Intento 1: Catch constraint error y retry - no resuelve el problema de fondo

issues.error: Aurio balance constraint violated during refund processing
issues.resolution: Changed refund logic to add Aurios back instead of subtracting negative amount
issues.approach: Refund logic was doing balance = balance - (-amount), which occasionally resulted in precision errors causing negative balance. Changed to balance = balance + abs(amount) to ensure positive operation.
attempts: Intento 1: Usar Decimal en vez de float - no resolvió completamente
Intento 2: Validar amount > 0 - fallaba con refunds negativos

issues.error: Aurio balance goes negative when withdrawal amount exceeds available balance
issues.resolution: Added atomic check-and-update with balance constraint validation
issues.approach: User could request withdrawal that exceeded balance due to race condition between check and update. Implemented atomic UPDATE WHERE balance >= amount query that returns affected rows; if 0 rows affected, balance was insufficient, preventing negative balance.
attempts: Intento 1: SELECT balance FOR UPDATE - funcionó pero lento
Intento 2: Optimistic locking con version - complejidad innecesaria

issues.error: Supabase RLS policy violation when Embajador tries to access other user data
issues.resolution: Fixed RLS policy to use auth.uid() instead of request parameter for user identification
issues.approach: RLS policy was checking user_id from request body, which could be manipulated. Changed policy to use auth.uid() from JWT token to ensure users can only access their own data. Added violation handling in Python layer.
attempts: Intento 1: Validar user_id en backend - RLS aún podía bypassearse directamente

issues.error: RLS policy violation error when admin tries to update mission status
issues.resolution: Created separate RLS policy for admin role with elevated permissions
issues.approach: Admins were getting RLS violation when updating missions because policy only allowed mission owner. Added new policy that checks user role from auth.jwt() role = admin to grant full access to admins.
attempts: Intento 1: Desactivar RLS para admins - riesgo de seguridad
Intento 2: Service role key - no auditable

issues.error: Supabase RLS policy violation when inserting transaction records
issues.resolution: Modified RLS policy to allow INSERT when user_id matches authenticated user
issues.approach: INSERT operations were failing with RLS violation because policy only covered SELECT. Added separate INSERT policy with CHECK (user_id = auth.uid()) to ensure users can only create transactions for themselves.
attempts: Intento 1: Usar misma policy para todas las operaciones - violaba principio de least privilege

issues.error: RLS policy violation when Tambu owner tries to view business analytics
issues.resolution: Added RLS policy linking users to businesses through ownership table
issues.approach: Tambu owners could not access their business data due to missing RLS policy. Created policy that JOINs business_owners table to verify ownership using auth.uid().
attempts: Intento 1: Hardcodear business_id en policy - no escalable
Intento 2: Pasar ownership en JWT claims - token muy grande

issues.error: Supabase RLS policy violation blocks legitimate service account operations
issues.resolution: Created bypass policy for service account using service_role key
issues.approach: Background jobs using service account were hitting RLS violations. Modified Supabase client initialization for background jobs to use service_role key which bypasses RLS.
attempts: Intento 1: Agregar service account a cada policy - mantenimiento complejo
Intento 2: Desactivar RLS temporalmente - riesgo de seguridad

issues.error: FTS5 MATCH syntax error when user searches with special characters
issues.resolution: Implemented query sanitization to escape special FTS5 characters before MATCH
issues.approach: Users typing queries like bug: auth-error caused FTS5 syntax errors because colon and dash are operators. Created sanitize function that wraps each term in quotes to make them literals.
attempts: Intento 1: Remove special chars - perdía información de búsqueda
Intento 2: Escape con backslash - FTS5 no reconoce backslash escape

issues.error: FTS5 query fails with near MATCH syntax error on parentheses
issues.resolution: Added special character sanitization for FTS5 operators including parentheses
issues.approach: Parentheses in queries were interpreted as FTS5 grouping operators. Modified sanitize function to detect and quote phrases containing special FTS5 operators: AND OR NOT and special characters.
attempts: Intento 1: Solo escapar paréntesis - otros operadores seguían fallando

issues.error: FTS5 MATCH error when query contains asterisk wildcard in wrong position
issues.resolution: Distinguish between intentional wildcards and literal asterisks in FTS5 queries
issues.approach: Asterisks in queries were causing errors. Added logic: if asterisk is at end of word keep as wildcard for prefix search; otherwise quote it as literal to sanitize the match query.
attempts: Intento 1: Escapar todos los asteriscos - perdimos búsqueda por prefijo
Intento 2: Permitir todos los asteriscos - queries inválidas

issues.error: FTS5 syntax error on queries with quotes inside search terms
issues.resolution: Sanitize quotes by doubling them for FTS5 MATCH compatibility
issues.approach: Queries with apostrophes were breaking FTS5 match. Implemented quote sanitization: replace single quote with two single quotes to escape in FTS5, and wrap phrase in double quotes to treat as literal string.
attempts: Intento 1: Remove quotes - perdía significado
Intento 2: Backslash escape - no funciona en FTS5

issues.error: FTS5 MATCH fails when user input contains dash-separated terms
issues.resolution: Modified FTS5 tokenizer configuration and sanitize dash-containing terms
issues.approach: Searches for hyphenated-terms were not matching because dash was treated as special operator. Reconfigured FTS5 tokenizer and updated sanitize function to quote dash-containing terms before MATCH.
attempts: Intento 1: Solo sanitizar - no indexaba correctamente
Intento 2: Reemplazar dash con espacio - perdía términos compuestos

issues.error: API timeout after 30 seconds on large report generation endpoint
issues.resolution: Implemented async task queue with circuit breaker for long-running operations
issues.approach: Report generation was exceeding 30s API timeout. Moved to async task queue that returns task ID immediately. Added circuit breaker (3 failures then open for 60s) to prevent cascade when report service is down.
attempts: Intento 1: Aumentar timeout a 120s - no resuelve el problema fundamental
Intento 2: Streaming response - complicaba manejo de errores

issues.error: API gateway timeout when calling external payment provider endpoint
issues.resolution: Added circuit breaker pattern for external API calls with timeout handling
issues.approach: External payment API was timing out causing gateway timeout. Implemented circuit breaker: after 5 consecutive timeouts open circuit for 30s and return cached fallback. Reset after successful call.
attempts: Intento 1: Aumentar timeout - no previene cascade failures
Intento 2: Retry agresivo - empeoró la situación

issues.error: Circuit breaker not tripping on slow API responses causing cascading timeouts
issues.resolution: Modified circuit breaker to track slow responses in addition to hard failures
issues.approach: Circuit breaker only tracked hard failures not slow responses. Added slow call tracking: if response time exceeds threshold count as partial failure. Circuit trips when failure score reaches threshold.
attempts: Intento 1: Solo timeout hard - no prevenía degradación
Intento 2: Timeout muy bajo - falsos positivos

issues.error: API timeout during database backup causing request failures in production
issues.resolution: Isolated backup operations with circuit breaker and separate connection pool
issues.approach: DB backup was locking tables and causing API timeouts. Moved backup to separate read replica connection with dedicated pool and added circuit breaker on primary pool to detect backup-induced slowness.
attempts: Intento 1: Backup durante low-traffic - no prevenía timeouts ocasionales
Intento 2: Backup sin locks - arriesgaba inconsistencia

issues.error: Cascade timeout failures when circuit breaker does not reset properly after recovery
issues.resolution: Fixed circuit breaker reset logic to use half-open state for testing recovery
issues.approach: Circuit breaker was staying open indefinitely because first request after timeout period would still fail. Implemented half-open state: after timeout allow 1 probe request; if succeeds close circuit; if fails reopen and double timeout.
attempts: Intento 1: Reset automático - causaba thrashing
Intento 2: Reset manual - no escalable

docs.chunk_body: Los Embajadores de Chakana necesitan acumular un mínimo de 1000 Aurios en su saldo antes de poder realizar un canje por dinero real. Esta restricción está diseñada para asegurar que los usuarios se comprometan con completar múltiples misiones antes de retirar fondos. El saldo mínimo también ayuda a reducir costos de transacción al consolidar múltiples recompensas en un solo retiro.

Cuando el agente recupera información del knowledge base VELMA, debe verificar el score de similitud semántica. Si el score es menor a 0.75, el resultado no debe usarse como contexto confiable y el agente debe razonar desde cero en lugar de basarse en información potencialmente irrelevante. Este umbral de confianza asegura que solo se utilice conocimiento verdaderamente relevante para la tarea actual.

Cada vez que el agente encuentra y resuelve un error, DEBE registrarlo en issues_log de VELMA. El registro debe incluir todos los intentos fallidos en el array attempts[], y solo marcar outcome=success cuando hay evidencia verificable de la resolución como output de tests que pasan. NUNCA marcar success porque el código se ve correcto sin evidencia real.

VELMA es un sistema de knowledge base persistente diseñado para agentes de IA que trabajan en la plataforma Chakana. Almacena issues resueltos, documentación de reglas de negocio, constraints del sistema, y razonamiento de decisiones técnicas. Utiliza SQLite con FTS5 para búsqueda de texto completo y embeddings de sentence-transformers para búsqueda semántica, permitiendo a los agentes recuperar contexto relevante de sesiones anteriores.

Cada vez que el agente utiliza información recuperada del knowledge base VELMA, debe citar explícitamente la fuente indicando el ID de la entrada y el score de similitud. Por ejemplo: Basándome en el issue #42 (similitud: 0.89). Esta práctica permite auditar el razonamiento del agente y verificar la calidad de la información utilizada.

Los agentes de IA NUNCA deben archivar entradas del knowledge base por su cuenta. Solo un humano puede marcar una entrada con status=archived después de revisar que la información está desactualizada. Los agentes pueden marcar entradas como verified o merged, pero archivar requiere juicio humano sobre el valor a largo plazo del conocimiento almacenado.

Al terminar una sesión de trabajo, el agente DEBE generar un session summary y guardarlo en reasoning_log. Este summary incluye las tareas completadas, el approach utilizado, el outcome de cada tarea, y cualquier aprendizaje importante. Mantiene continuidad del conocimiento entre sesiones. NO es opcional cerrar sin summary.

docs.chunk_title: Concepto: Ciclo de vida de entradas
docs.chunk_body: Las entradas en VELMA siguen un ciclo de vida de cuatro estados: raw (recién creada), verified (confirmada con evidencia), merged (consolidada desde múltiples fuentes), archived (desactualizada pero preservada). Los agentes crean entradas raw, pueden promover a verified con evidencia, y merge_knowledge.py consolida verified en merged. Solo humanos archivan.
